name: Course Framework
description: The course framework defines how lessons, modules, and learning experiences are structured within the Blessedly Stressed OS ecosystem.

course.description: A complete learning experience with multiple modules

module.description: A themed unit within a course containing multiple lessons

lesson.description: A single teaching unit with content and application

modules.title: Foundation: Identity in Christ
modules.description: Establishing who you are before establishing what you do.
lessons: State Check: Know Before You Go

modules.title: Kingdom Flow: Purpose & Direction
modules.description: Discovering and walking in your God-given purpose.

modules.title: DC Flow: Creative Expression
modules.description: Using creativity as worship and testimony.

modules.title: Stewardship & Service
modules.description: Managing the gifts and resources God has given you.
